evidence.q1: Sections numbered 1-15 sequentially; cross-reference in Section 6 'Notwithstanding Section 4' resolves.
evidence.q2: 'Major Investor', 'Requisite Holders', 'Permitted Transferee' defined in Section 2 and used consistently thereafter.
evidence.q3: No vague time/quantity phrasing; deadlines specified as '45 days', '120 days'.
evidence.q4: No archaic diction such as 'whereas', 'heretofore', etc.
evidence.q5: No contradictory or broken sentence; e.g., 'The Board will consist of five directors...' is grammatical.
evidence.q6: Register consistent: all sections use modern, direct prose without authorial shifts.
